drl:
rule "R0"
when
    T2(f0 < 11, f0 in (-1000000007, 12, -1000000007), $b0_0_0 : f0, $b0_0_1 : f0)
    not T2(f0 < -1000000007)
    $p0_2 : T0(f3 != false, f2 != false, $b0_2_0 : f1, $b0_2_1 : f3, f2 == false)
then
    $p0_2.setF2(true);
    $p0_2.setF0($b0_2_0);
    update($p0_2);
end
rule "R1"
salience 4
when
    ( T1($b1_0_0 : f2) and not T2() and $p1_2 : T1() )
    or
    ( T1($b1_0_0 : f2) and not T2() and $p1_2 : T1(f1 < -1.0) )
    or
    ( T1($b1_0_0 : f2) and not T2() and $p1_2 : T1(f2 in (true)) )
then
    insertLogical(new T2($p1_2.getF1()));
end
